tasks.label: OpenSpace: Check Frontend Dependencies
args: if [ ! -d tools/openspace/frontend/node_modules ]; then echo 'Installing frontend dependencies...' && cd tools/openspace/frontend && npm install; else echo 'Frontend dependencies already installed'; fi
if not exist tools\openspace\frontend\node_modules (echo Installing frontend dependencies... && cd tools\openspace\frontend && npm install) else (echo Frontend dependencies already installed)
